comment:
I used to be very anti-ai until I gave this plugin a try in both Rider and Visual Studio (as well as Chat GPT / Codex). A year later, I can say it is a tremendous time saver and the models keep getting better and better.

My only nitpick is that the version of this plugin for Rider / IntelliJ sometimes stops generating completion suggestions, even if I type a comment and wait for a bit. This problem doesn't happen with Visual Studio's version.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: Works bad. Hate it

comment: Any help on how to integrate Ollama using the BYOK mode? Thanks!

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: Literally is rendering Intellij useless. The entire IDE is basically frozen when this plugin is enabled. Probably going to force me to move away from IntelliJ w/o a good AI pair programmer option. Amazon Q is not quite there yet.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment: It's baffling how big the gap is between VSCode's GitHub Copilot and this plugin. The performance reduces with longer histories. So restoring an old session first takes up to a minute post launch. This plugin also shares the same issue that Visual Studio GitHub Copilot has; there's no guarantee that the revert function will properly revert the codebase. There's always a chance that it scrambles it. Models aren't provided with sufficient IDE tools, or context about the cli environment. Which means that the models, without further MCP tools, rely on cli guesswork. Git doesn't have any separate approval system. If you approve all git commands, there's a chance the model will make commits or resets without user approval. So it's best to use a MCP server for git. I also see tons of server-related issues, and the plugin doesn't gracefully deal with those. So there's no repeat function. Instead you have to continue the conversation, because the revert button doesn't show up.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
I’m eventually going to stop using PHPStorm because of this plugin:

  • It’s very outdated compared to the Visual Studio Code one
  • You can’t hide models

  • Continuous interruptions with the models
  • The free models have stopped being functional

Why it became so useless now?

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
The latest version doesn't work at all. This is a complete garbage. I'm not joking. It doesn't work "at all". You should download and install older version from "Versions" link from this page. I question the mindset and the system that allowed such garbage to be released. Please fix this immediately.

Let me elaborate. The previous version was incredibly useful. It would suggest ideas that perfectly matched the context and provided powerful support. It was as if it could read my mind. Now, that excellent co-pilot is gone. That’s why I find it so disappointing.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
Leaving 1 star to draw attention to that the GitHub Copilot Chat could stand some improvement in terms of

  • not crashing during prompt submit without the ability to get the prompt text back, or during switching Mode (Ask/Edit/Agent)
  • never stand in the way to copy contents of my chat (there is some serious issue with copying the text when using "Inline Chat" also)
  • issue with applying Agent code, if you make edits to the file

Also, I've noticed that the responses from GitHub Copilot frustrate me often due to slow answering speed, and the tone of answers is somewhat "?boring?" comparing to Chat GPT for example.

It also is incredibly slow. I've stopped using it because it's functionally dead.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
New bug in the latest update.

Whenever I open a new conversation or reopen the browser, it automatically edits the files even if the changes have already been saved and committed. I have to roll back all the time.

This plugin has always been problematic; every update has a new issue. Even though I have a PHP Storm license, I'm switching to VS Code.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
IDEA Version of this Plugin has a lot of bugs. In VS Code I found no problems.

Examples: -Terminal cannot be read, bot tells output is empty -Chat freezes waiting for terminal, although it is fininished -IDE freezes regularly for about 3 minutes when chat gets longer -Switching to Agent Mode and back takes multiple seconds -Agent stops working, telling your prompt is to long (*new since last update) -Cannot add other files or images anymore except text files within the workspace -IDE freezes if you scale the Chat Window -Chat Window scrolles if you try to copy text -Input vanishes if you accidentally hit a special button (don't know which, but really annoying) -No retries errors, agent stops completely for nothing.. -Auto Mode is a piece of shit, just uses Codex Model instead of Opus for planning -MCP Servers sometimes just don't get connected -New bugs with every update...

To use the best models, you need a subscription. Really seeking for an alternative..

comment:
Overall poor experience.

These issues make it a struggle to use practically:

  1. unable to search previous chats.
  2. unable to share chats with other devs.
  3. unable to even copy the chat transcript in any meaningful way.

Annoyance: 4. interaction dialog has scrollback for recently input prompts, but accidentally keying down on a new prompt deletes what you've just written.

Do the plugin devs actually use it themselves?

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
Full of persistent bugs. After 6 months of use (since September 2025), I'm disappointed by the consistent technical issues:

  • Terminal outputs not returning to the agent
  • Frequent chat history loss
  • Scrolling and navigation issues
  • Severe performance problems (10-20 second IDE freezes on good hardware)
  • Limited features compared to competitors The lower price point is the only advantage, but these issues have driven me (crazy) to seek alternatives.

plugin.name: GitHub Copilot - Your AI Pair Programmer

comment:
This plugin is essential yet has so many broken features:

  • Constant lock ups of whatever Jetbrains IDE you're using. Jetbrains will flag this component as causing performance problems constantly.
  • Ignores whether you're in Agent mode or Ask mode (sometimes Agent requests will get spit into Chat instead of acted upon).
